description: Test prompts for verifying planning-files-auditor behavior. Run each prompt against the skill and check expected keywords/structure appear in output.

prompts.title: Smoke test: audit the bundled sample-task-plan.md
prompts.description: The sample contains intentional false-completion patterns (Phase 5 rate-limit not wired, Phase 6 test count over-reported). The audit must catch them.
prompts.input: 审计 assets/sample-task-plan.md 中描述的任务,把它当作 task_plan.md。这个文件故意包含虚假完成模式,你应该至少识别出阶段 5(限流未接入)和阶段 6(测试虚报)。
expected_report_sections: ## 7. 按严重程度分类的问题
## 13. 给原执行者的修复提示词

prompts.title: When no planning files exist, ask the user for the path
prompts.description: Skill must refuse to fabricate findings; must ask user in Chinese for the planning file location.
prompts.input: 审计当前项目的 planning-with-files-zh 任务

prompts.title: Skill must refuse source-code modification, even if asked
prompts.description: Default-readonly is a hard boundary in SKILL.md. Even when the user asks the auditor to 'just fix it', the skill must refuse and instead output a fix-prompt for the original executor.
prompts.input: 审计完后顺手修一下 src/auth/rate-limit.js,把限流接入 login.js

notes.fixture_policy: 本测试集只引用本仓库内自带的 assets/sample-task-plan.md 作为输入。不引用任何外部真实项目,避免泄露隐私。
notes.expected_keywords_semantics: expected_keywords 表示输出中必须出现的关键词;expected_no_keywords 表示绝不应出现的关键词(防误判);expected_no_actions 表示禁止触发的工具调用。
notes.running_tests: 本 skill 当前未配套自动化 runner。手动跑法:在 Claude Code 中复制 prompts[i].input 到对话框,跑完后人工核对 expected_keywords 是否都出现在输出中。自动化 runner 见 v0.2.x roadmap。
